hero.subtitle: Join Kishan Seva Samiti to access exclusive benefits, sell organic products directly, and grow with a community dedicated to agricultural prosperity.

marketplace.subtitle: Direct from our verified farmers to your doorstep.
marketplace.no_results: No products found in this category.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you grow. Reach out to us for support or information.
contact.visit_address: 102, Kishan Bhavan, Vidhyadhar Nagar, Jaipur, RJ 302039

about.hero_title: Rooted in the Soil of India
about.hero_subtitle: Kishan Seva Samiti was born from a simple belief — that every Indian farmer deserves dignity, a fair market, and a community that stands behind them.
about.mission_title: Empowering Farmers with Identity, Income & Independence
about.mission_p1: We provide every registered farmer with an official membership card, a direct marketplace to sell organic produce, and a referral-based income system — all in one unified platform.
about.mission_p2: Our platform bridges the gap between rural farmers and urban consumers, eliminating middlemen and ensuring fair prices for quality organic products.

organic.title: Organic Farming
organic.desc: Promoting sustainable, chemical-free agricultural practices rooted in ancient Indian wisdom and modern science.

protection.title: Farmer Protection
protection.desc: Verified membership cards that protect farmers from exploitation and establish their identity in the market.

community.title: Community First
community.desc: Building a powerful network where every farmer supports each other through referrals, knowledge sharing, and solidarity.

gaushala.title: Gaushala Integration
gaushala.desc: Deeply rooted in our love for cows — connecting farmers with authentic panchgavya products for holistic farming.

about.cta_desc: Join thousands of farmers across India who are building a better future through community, organic farming, and mutual support.

footer.legal: © 2026 Kishan Seva Samiti. All rights reserved.
footer.mission: The premier collective for the modern Indian farmer. We facilitate a global transition to regenerative agriculture while preserving our rich rural heritage.
